title: Path of the Renegade
author: andy-chambers
description: Archon Yllithian seeks to restore his dwindling power within the dark city of Commorragh by resurrecting a long-dead champion, setting in motion a chain of treachery and violence that could tear the city apart.

title: Path of the Incubus
author: andy-chambers
description: As Yllithian's desperate plan to resurrect the ancient champion El'uriaq accelerates, the politics of Commorragh grow ever more lethal and the consequences of meddling with forbidden power become increasingly clear.

title: Path of the Archon
author: andy-chambers
description: The resurrection of El'uriaq is complete but the ancient champion's return threatens to consume Commorragh itself, and Yllithian must face the full consequences of his ruthless ambition in a final battle for the dark city's survival.
